#  View Paid Invoices (Draft) 
##  Things to Consider 
##  Prerequisites 
  * [Create a Subcontractor Invoice](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/invoice-administrator-guide/create-subcontractor-invoices)


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the Company level **Payments** tool.
  2. Click the **Payments** tab.


## See Also
  * [About the Subcontractor Invoices Tab in the Payments Tool](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/procore-pay/tutorials/about-the-subcontractor-invoices-tab-in-the-payments-tool)
  * [Sign Lien Waivers on Project Invoices](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/procore-pay/tutorials/sign-lien-waivers-on-project-invoices)
  * [Create Disbursements](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/procore-pay/tutorials/create-disbursements)
title: View Paid Invoices (Draft)
description: How to view a list of paid invoices.
